# Ellipse points

Ellipse points

## Usage

``` r
ellipse_points(par_ellipse, columns = c(1, 2), n_points = 100)
```

## Arguments

- par_ellipse:

  An ellipse object with ellipse parameters

- columns:

  The number of columns of the ellipse to get the points

- n_points:

  The number of points for the ellipses to plot

## Value

A data frame with the coordinates to plot

## Examples

``` r
ellipse_points(ellipse_par_example)
```
